test.name: Be Health Check

kw.name: Skip If
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test if the ``condition`` is True.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://10.244.3.95:8079/hams/alive path_url=/hams/alive headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Test to verify the be health endpoint is responding directly on the pod IP.

test.name: Be API Hello Check

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://sward-warden-be/v0/hello path_url=/v0/hello headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://sward-warden-be/v0/hello status=404, reason=Not Found headers={'vary': 'origin, access-control-request-method, access-control-request-headers', 'content-length': '0', 'date': 'Sat, 30 May 2026 21:30:54 GMT', 'x-envoy-upstream-service-time': '103', 'server': 'envoy'} body=None

kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Test to verify the be API hello endpoint via the Service (default port 80).

test.name: Be API Hello Check via Pod

kw.name: Skip If
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test if the ``condition`` is True.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://10.244.3.95:8080/v0/hello path_url=/v0/hello headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Test to verify the be API hello endpoint directly on the pod IP (port 8080).

test.name: Users BREAD Operations

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://sward-warden-be/v0/users path_url=/v0/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '80', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"id": 0, "name": "Test User", "email": "test_9342@example.com", "role": "user"}'

kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.doc: Test BREAD operations for Users. Note: Read (by ID), Edit, and Delete are not implemented in the backend.

test.name: Farms BREAD Operations

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{farm_data} = { id=0 | name=Test Farm | location=123 Test Lane | has_derogation=True }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: about:blank
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector app-root at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Teardown With Video
Close Context
kw.msg: Switching context to CURRENT in CURRENT
kw.doc: Closes a Context.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run
kw.doc: _This keyword is considered deprecated. Use the [http://robotframework.org/robotframework/latest/libraries/Process.html| Process] library instead._

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Close the browser context to finalize the video, then embed it in the log/report.

test.doc: Test to verify the application loads via the external DNS defined in the virtual service. NOTE: Expecting potential resolution failures until gateway DNS is fully configured.

test.name: Farm Creation and Deletion Flow

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/tmp/reports/browser/traces/temp/f8b22220-761e-403b-9cde-8c4678897e0a"}

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'E2E Test Farm 2114' in the given field.
Fill text E2E Test Farm 2114 on #farm-name-input with force: false

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'E2E Test Location' in the given field.
Fill text E2E Test Location on #farm-location-input with force: false
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click With Options
kw.msg: Click options are: {"button": "left", "clickCount": 1, "force": true, "noWaitAfter": false, "trial": false}
Clicked element: '#save-farm-btn' with options: '{"button": "left", "clickCount": 1, "force": true, "noWaitAfter": false, "trial": false}' successfully.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=E2E Test Farm 2114 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://sward-warden-be/v0/farms path_url=/v0/farms headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://sward-warden-be/v0/farms status=404, reason=Not Found headers={'vary': 'origin, access-control-request-method, access-control-request-headers', 'content-length': '0', 'date': 'Sat, 30 May 2026 21:31:04 GMT', 'x-envoy-upstream-service-time': '3', 'server': 'envoy'} body=None

Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/pwuser/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/RequestsLibrary/utils.py", line 141, in decorator return func(*args, **kwargs) File "/home/pwuser/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/RequestsLibrary/RequestsKeywords.py", line 193, in session_less_get self._check_status(expected_status, response, msg) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/pwuser/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/RequestsLibrary/SessionKeywords.py", line 582, in _check_status assert_equal(resp.status_code, expected_status, msg) ~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/pwuser/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/robot/utils/asserts.py", line 180, in assert_equal _report_inequality(first, second, "!=", msg, values, formatter) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/pwuser/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/robot/utils/asserts.py", line 237, in _report_inequality raise AssertionError(msg) AssertionError: Url: http://sward-warden-be/v0/farms Expected status: 404 != 200
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

Close the browser context to finalize the video, then embed it in the log/report.

test.name: Fe Index Check

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Test to verify the fe is serving the index.html page.
